This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.

recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.

    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(StatementBlock child, SynchronizedBlock parent)

    static void

    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
